feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting Timeout Error when adding a S4 HANA system in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have downloaded Eclipse for IDE fromEclipse.org. We have an existing S4 HANA system with below installed Product versions (screenshot below). When I try to add this SAP system into Eclipse under ABAP Perspective. It just timeout. Attached below is the Eclipse Trace log

LOCATION SAP-Gateway on host 
sapgw01
ERROR timeout during allocate
TIME Wed Nov 20 15:40:27 2024
RELEASE 789
COMPONENT SAP-Gateway
VERSION 2
RC 242
MODULE /bas/789_REL/src/krn/si/gw/gwr3cpic.c
LINE 2264
DETAIL no connect of TP sapdp01 from host 10.53.252.5 after 20 sec
COUNTER 2
(remote system is [<unknown>])
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.AbstractConnection.generateJCoException(AbstractConnection.java:623)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ClientConnection.connectInternal(ClientConnection.java:626)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ClientConnection.connect(ClientConnection.java:1202)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.RepositoryConnection.connect(RepositoryConnection.java:190)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.PoolingFactory.init(PoolingFactory.java:116)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ConnectionManager.createFactory(ConnectionManager.java:527)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultConnectionManager.createFactory(DefaultConnectionManager.java:31)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ConnectionManager.getFactory(ConnectionManager.java:469)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.RfcDestination.getSystemID(RfcDestination.java:1697)
... 35 more
Caused by: RfcException raised by system [<unknown>]:
message: Connect from SAP gateway to RFC server failed
connection parameters: TYPE=A DESTINATION=S4D_100_ecosys3_en ASHOST=10.53.252.5 SYSNR=01 PCS=1

SAP Experts can you please help. We need to add this system for developing CDS views
BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) ABAP Development  #Eclipse

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - GR Based IV indicator Check
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where the intercompany stock transfer happens from US to UK or France and they don't need to have invoice for that.

Is it possible to create a 0 dollar purchase order in SAP S/4 public cloud. I tried by creating a NBIC PO with marking that line item free but it still throwing an error that GR and IR indicators are necessary. GR Based IV indicator is greyed out and I couldn't do any manual control over that. I checked in Vendor master and it's unticked on that and also there is no PIR maintained for that product. I believe it's a system default setting. Would someone can throw some lights on the above would be great.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Difference between Readiness Check and Sizing values
entry.content:
Hello!

A customer is going to migrate from:
ECC 6.0 to RISE S/4HANA Private Edition

We are evaluating how much additional memory we have to add to the target architecture.
The Sizing report indicates (Gib):
- Memory requirement 1,604.0
- Net data size on disk 1,490.2

The Readiness Check report indicates:
Anticipated Initial Memory Requirement for SAP HANA 524 (in GiB)

We have few questions about the Readiness Check and Sizing reports:

1) Which of the two data (Readiness Check or Sizing) do I take to calculate the memory required for the migration?

2) Where does it indicate in these reports the amount of memory required for the following SKUs:
FileSystem
File Storage
8008794 - Additional File Storage
8011367 - Additional Database Storage

3) Or how could I calculate FileSystem and FileStorage?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: what language does S/4 support?
entry.content:
Client wants to know
1) what language S/4 HANA supports
2) what language of user manuals SAP provides
3) the language support difference between Private and Public edition

where can I check them?

entry.title: FSP0/FS00 translation fields (SKAT) not changable
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Since the update to SAP S/4HANA 2023, G/L account texts in transaction FS00 or FSP0 can no longer be changed in certain languages because the fields are not active despite change mode.
More precisely, this concerns
Program: SAPLGL_ACCOUNT_MASTER_MAINTAIN
Screen: 2105
Fields:
GLACCOUNT_SCREEN_COA-TXT20_TX
GLACCOUNT_SCREEN_COA-TXT50_TX
 
Here is a screenshot of the transaction:
As you can see, only EN can be changed or new entry may be added. But DE and PL is not changeable.
 
In TC MASS and FST2, the texts can be changed without any problems. So it must have something to do with FS00/FSP0, not with field status.
Have any of you observed anything like this? Do you know what can be done?

Thanks in advance for any advice and best regards
Rado

entry.title: Tcode me28 user id wise supplier plant restriction.
entry.content:
We have near 20 plants.

Currently in tcode me28 any user can able to see any plant details.

But we need to restrict user id wise supplier plant authorization access.

Can you help how to restrict this is must? because in the present system any body can able to see any plant and do the approval in this tcode.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CKM3N. cost component split for semi finished
entry.content:
hi guys,

we are doing actual costing. 

Say , 1 FERT material consumed 1 HALB material, 1 HALB consumed 1 ROH. at period end CKMLCP was handled. 

CKM3N of HALB shows production consumption the initial goods issue document (with no cost component) and the next line of calculated price difference, which is split by cost component correctly. 

So essentially rollup is not working.

when your consumption of 100 dollars HALB is not split, and the price difference of 50ct is split, that's not too much of actual costing.

S4H 107. 

Actually, same happens with the COGS posting. there is a GI posting for 100 eur, no cost component, 

and then there is a new line of revaluation of the price difference, and that line is split by cost components.

Question. How can I "enforce" the cost component split for HALB on initial goods issue document  (261 consumption to FERT) ?  I feel I am missing a SPRO checkbox somewhere.

thank you.
Laimonas

entry.title: Getting error during reporting missing HU in PI process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We couldn"t be able to report missing HU via RF getting below error where bin having single HU and can be able to report missing HUs where Bin having more than one HU.

Error: Not all quants for product 51431704 were counted; no save possible (/SCWM/UI_PI026).

Regards,

Santhosh

entry.title: PCN874 - Update Record Type
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to update Record Type (H-Any Other Document) for one Israeli Vendor with specific tax code and excepted output should be when we will run the PCN874 report then record type H should reflect in the PCN874.txt file. 

I have updated record type in /ATL/RECTYPE1 table and tried to run report (after posting a vendor invoice) but no expected result.

Can anyone suggest what needs to be updated?

entry.title: Message no.VN03 in MR90
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am getting below error while try to execute output message in MR90. 

checked MRM1 to maintain record but error didnt change. can you please help me to resolve this?

 

Thanks,

Faizan Ahmed

entry.title: MB52 'SQL code: 4' error
entry.content:
Hi  Experts

When I use MB52 for a full query and there is a error ' SQL error "SQL code: 4" occurred while accessing table "NSDM_E_MSPR".'  Can you help me .

entry.title: Hand Over of Purchase Requisition generated from MRP not showing in MyInbox for approuval
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I'm using the handover process,  so when the PR generated from MRP, they  are checked by the planner and then once OK they are  handed over to supply team, those MRP generated PR once handed over they need to go through approuval (PR workflow of approuval via Firoi y Inbox), Im using the standard workflow and not the flixible one

The PR generated manuellay are displayed in the MyInbox, but the MRP PR once handed over, I can't find them in the INBOX, I can see the tab release strategy displayed in the PR once handed over but they dont go to the Inbox for approuver so I have to do ME54N toi approuve them

Any Help regarding this please

entry.title: S/4HANA for Utilities 2023 Market Process Management end maintenance conflict with 2040 commitment
entry.content:
In Feb 4 2020, SAP published a commitment to have SAP S/4HANA maintenance commitment until end of 2040. https://news.sap.com/2020/02/sap-s4hana-maintenance-2040-clarity-choice-sap-business-suite-7/

A large utility customer has recently bought the SAP S/4HANA for Utilities 2023 and in the hope that SAP will honor that commitment including all associated Utilties components (i.e. Market Process Management/MPM, Advance Metering Infrastructure, Energy Data Management, SAP_UI).   

Customer is currently on a journey to convert the ECC/IS-U to S/4HANA for Utilities 2023.  In Nov 2023, SAP released an update that the Market Management Process for Utilities for SAP S/4HANA (Maintenance of current Release SAP S/4HANA MPM UTIL 2305) - Maintenance Plan is ending 31.12.2027.

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/support/en_us/library/ssp/release-upgrade-maintenance/maintenance-information/rcs/market-process-management-for-utilities-for-sap-s4hana.pdf

Key questions:

1. How is SAP aligning the end of maintenance for various components (e.g. MPM) with our S/4HANA 2040 end of maintenance commitment?

2. How is SAP responding to our large customers while they are going through a major S/4HANA for Utilities transformation program when a new maintenance strategy released has significant impact to the overall programme and risks loosing the customer confidence in choosing our product to run their business in the future?

entry.title: Detailed Scheduling Missing for Planned Orders After MRP Run - SAP Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello all,

We recently upgraded our SAP system to the latest version, retaining all master data and customizations as they were before. However, I’m encountering an issue with detailed scheduling for planned orders during MRP runs:

  • Issue Description:
    When MRP creates a planned order, the capacity requirements are not scheduled, and the Detailed Scheduling tab is missing in the planned order. Specifically:

    • Entries in KBKO and KBED tables (capacity requirements) are not created.
    • The BEDID (Capacity Requirement ID) is not passed to the PLAF table.

    However, if I manually open the planned order created by MRP and click the Scheduling button:

    • Capacity requirements are scheduled.
    • Entries in KBKO and KBED are created.
    • The BEDID is updated in the PLAF table.

  • Additional Context:

    1. This issue only occurs in the updated system; it was working fine before the upgrade - MRP did generate scheduling and the table entries created.
    2. It still works correctly in our quality system, which is on the previous SAP version.
    3. I have tested MRP via MD01N and SAPAPO Product View, but detailed scheduling is not triggered in either case.

  • Troubleshooting Attempts:

    • Debugged PPH_MRP_START, but couldn’t find the root cause.
    • Verified that all customizing and master data are unchanged from the previous version.

  • Question:
    Could you help me understand:

    1. Which ABAP program, function module, or method generates the capacity requirements entries in KBKO and KBED during MRP run?
    2. How can I debug this process further to identify what’s not being triggered after the upgrade?

Any insights or suggestions to debug the issue backward would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help.

SCM APO Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling (PP/DS)

entry.title: S/4HANA CRM - Service Order/Confirmation split valuation of service part
entry.content:
I have an issue with some spare parts that are managed with a split valuation. In the service confirmation I get the error to enter the valuation type required for the GI, or else the system will not let me finish the confirmation.

The issue is that there is no way to enter the valuation type in the service order, the service confirmation, or the reservation for the service part. Is there a way to maintain the valuation type manually, so that the system lets me complete the confirmation and issue this part?

I am aware of OSS note 3466597 that states that full support for split valuation in Service is coming with 2023 Feature Pack 2, but our system is not on that currently. Looking for a workaround.

Thank you,

Danail

entry.title: S4 Upgrade: Starting the Shadow Instance after a reboot
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I am having troubles when restarting a shadow instance after a reboot.

I have sucessfully started the classical (non shadow instance) with sapcontrol.

I have started the sapstartsrv for the shadow (D02):
# su - xxxadm
% /usr/sap/XXX/SUM/abap/exe/sapstartsrv pf=/usr/sap/XXX/SUM/abap/system/XXX/SYS/profile/XXX_D02_xxxxxx -D -u xxxadm

When I start the shadown the enqueue and the message server start.
But the dispatcher does not start:
# grep -i err dev_disp
rdisp/ms_conn_error_handling: suspend/suspend timeout/resume delay = 1/300/10
*** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W0 (pid 9203) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549]
SECTION: Last Error Information
|No |Pid |Type|State |Cause|Err|Prio|Sess-Key |Sess-Type|Locked|Sem|Time |Program |Cli|User |Action |Action-Info |
*** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W1 (pid 9204) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549]
...

*** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W28 (pid 9231) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549]
*** DP_FATAL_ERROR => DpWpCheck: no more work processes
|No |Pid |Type|State |Cause|Err|Prio|Sess-Key |Sess-Type|Locked|Sem|Time |Program |Cli|User |Action |Action-Info |
|No |Pid |Type|State |Cause|Err|Prio|Sess-Key |Sess-Type|Locked|Sem|Time |Program |Cli|User |Action |Action-Info |
return errno (-17) to T0_U1
DpTmSend: errormsg without overhead: take session 0
*** ERROR => NiIWrite: SiSendV failed for hdl 33/sock 14
*** ERROR => DpTmSend: NiBufSend failed(rc=-6: NIECONN_BROKEN)->disconnect T0_U1 [dpTerminal.c 1332]
AdCvtRecToExt: opcode 60 (AD_SELFIDENT), ser 0, ex 0, errno 0
AdCvtRecToExt: opcode 40 (AD_MSBUF), ser 0, ex 0, errno 0
AdCvtRecToExt: opcode 40 (AD_MSBUF), ser 0, ex 0, errno 0

Would you know what I have missed for starting this shadow instance.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Easily perform a mass reset of expired or unused initial user passwords SU10
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

To easily and quickly reset an expired or unused initial password, we need to follow these steps:

1.Use the SAP report RSUSR200, which we will execute from transaction SE38,or execute the SU10 transaction and select the " logon data" button.

 

Execute the SU10 transaction and select the logon data button :

 

 

Or Report RSUSR200 from se38:

In this report, filter by the following fields to generate a list of users who are experiencing issues with their initial password:

Select filters:

Execute : 

List of Users:

 

We export the usernames from the User column to a spreadsheet.

2. Execute the SU10 transaction and select the "Address  Data"  button:

 

Select the 'User' field and in the Multiple selection for S_BANAME, choose upload from the clipboard and copy the list of users from the spreadsheet.

 

Copy and execute 

 

1.Select All

2.Click Transfer button

 

On this screen, choose 'Select All' once more:

 

 

Click Change password 

 

Click Generate button

A new initial password will be created for the selected users. After execution, a list will appear with the text message: Generate password for user XXXXXX

 

I hope this can be helpful to someone. 😉

Thanks in advance

Best Regards!

entry.title: Purchase requisitions are not visible in clip icon in Workflow.
entry.content:
I have created PR (ME51N) with the attachment file. but the attachment is not visible in Workflow

Could anyone please suggest a solution?

Thanks

entry.title: Maintain classification in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts

We would like to implement S/4HANA International Trade. What are the options to mass create control classes (ECCN)? From the SAP best practices, there seem to be a direct integration with a data provider. But would it be possible to load a file (XML or CSV) without setting up an integration with data providers?

 

Thanks in advance,

Stéphanie

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - Email Notification for Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've configured the below steps to achieve email notification for Credit Memo Process Approval Workflow, but still I'm not able to receive a email notification for the same. Please advice if I'm missing anything in here.

1. Created workflow rules for Credit Memo and also did Manage Teams and Responsibilities

2. Created a custom template using Maintain Email Template (Approval Request for Credit Memo Request SD_SLS_CMR_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL)

3. Configured Sender Email Address

4. Changed the settings in Output Parameter Determination.

Still I'm not receiving an email after the creation of Credit Memo. 

Please advice.

Thanks,

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales
